items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普在土耳其出席防务联盟峰会时抨击西班牙没有为北约做出足够的贡献。

items.title_zh: 电子竞技世界杯如何在 8 周内从沙特阿拉伯移师巴黎
items.desc_en: The Esports World Cup gets going in Paris after a last-minute move from Saudi Arabia. Is it any less controversial?
items.desc_zh: 在沙特阿拉伯最后一刻转会后，电子竞技世界杯在巴黎拉开帷幕。争议是不是少了一些？

items.title_en: Trains and emergency calls affected after major outage at Australia's largest telecoms company
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚最大电信公司发生重大停电，火车和紧急呼叫受到影响
items.desc_en: Servers at data centres in Sydney and Melbourne were to blame but the exact cause remains unknown.
items.desc_zh: 悉尼和墨尔本数据中心的服务器是罪魁祸首，但确切原因仍不清楚。

items.title_en: US strikes target Iranian military boats
items.title_zh: 美国空袭伊朗军舰
items.desc_en: The US has launched the strikes on Iran in response to attacks on three oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 美国针对霍尔木兹海峡三艘油轮遇袭事件对伊朗发动打击。

items.title_en: Nato allies announce £37bn for new missile project
items.title_zh: 北约盟国宣布斥资370亿英镑用于新导弹项目
items.desc_en: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer will convene around a dozen leaders to discuss the programme in Ankara.
items.desc_zh: 总理基尔·斯塔默爵士将在安卡拉召集十几位领导人讨论该计划。

items.title_en: Utah boarding school where Paris Hilton alleged abuse as a teen loses its licence
items.title_zh: 帕丽斯·希尔顿 (Paris Hilton) 因虐待犹他州寄宿学校青少年而被吊销执照
items.desc_en: Hilton said the facility "failed the children", as regulators cited neglect and use of unnecessary restraints.
items.desc_zh: 希尔顿表示，该设施“辜负了孩子们的期望”，监管机构称其疏忽和使用了不必要的限制。

items.title_en: Australia dock workers call for 28-hour week in AI talks
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚码头工人在人工智能谈判中呼吁每周工作 28 小时
items.desc_en: A union says workers are "in the crosshairs" of automation as AI is being tested across ports.
items.desc_zh: 一个工会表示，随着人工智能正在跨港口进行测试，工人们正处于自动化的“十字准线”中。

items.title_zh: 微软在“重大重组”中裁员 4,800 人并缩小 Xbox 规模
items.desc_en: The sweeping layoffs equate to 2.1% of Microsoft's workforce, with 1,600 immediate job losses at Xbox.
items.desc_zh: 这次大规模裁员相当于微软员工总数的 2.1%，Xbox 立即失业 1,600 人。

items.title_zh: 家长警告不要公开分享儿童图像，以免存在人工智能滥用风险
items.desc_en: The NCA says there is a growing threat of children's images being used to create child abuse material.
items.desc_zh: NCA 表示，儿童图像被用来制作虐待儿童材料的威胁越来越大。

items.title_en: AI is 'not smart' so what's next in artificial intelligence?
items.title_zh: 人工智能“不聪明”，那么人工智能的下一步是什么？
items.desc_en: Leading AI researcher Yan LeCun has a start-up which is developing a more flexible AI system.
items.desc_zh: 领先的人工智能研究员严乐存拥有一家初创公司，正在开发更灵活的人工智能系统。

items.title_en: Meta glasses wearers hit with paywall to use built-in feature
items.title_zh: Meta 眼镜佩戴者需要付费才能使用内置功能
items.desc_en: A feature in Meta's glasses which boosts the voice of people will be capped at three hours for free use.
items.desc_zh: Meta眼镜中的一项增强人们声音的功能将被限制免费使用三个小时。

items.title_en: Google must pay €4.1bn fine for using Android to 'block' rivals
items.title_zh: 谷歌因使用 Android“阻止”竞争对手而须支付 41 亿欧元罚款
items.desc_en: A Google spokesperson said the judgement "fails to recognise" the firm's "significant investment to ensure Android remains open."
items.desc_zh: 谷歌发言人表示，该判决“未能认可”该公司“为确保 Android 保持开放而进行的重大投资”。

items.title_en: Don't expect trackers to save your stolen car, experts say
items.title_zh: 专家表示，不要指望追踪器能够拯救你被盗的汽车
items.desc_en: Kia told the BBC UK law prevented its location tracking function being used to live track vehicles.
items.desc_zh: 起亚告诉英国广播公司，英国法律禁止其位置跟踪功能用于实时跟踪车辆。

items.title_en: Wonka Netflix show faces backlash for AI-generated Gene Wilder voice
items.title_zh: Netflix 节目《旺卡》因人工智能生成吉恩·怀尔德声音而遭到强烈反对
items.desc_en: The actor, who died in 2016, appears in the Netflix show with the consent of his estate.
items.desc_zh: 这位于 2016 年去世的演员在得到其遗产管理人的同意后出现在 Netflix 节目中。

items.title_en: PlayStation will stop releasing games on discs in 2028
items.title_zh: PlayStation 将于 2028 年停止发行光盘游戏
items.desc_en: The firm said future games would still be sold in shops, but they would come with a digital code only.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，未来的游戏仍将在商店出售，但它们只会附带数字代码。

items.title_en: E-scooters being advertised for commuting despite UK road ban
items.title_zh: 尽管英国道路禁令，电动滑板车仍在做通勤广告
items.desc_en: A Press Association investigation found major retailers advertising e-scooters for "commuting" and "urban riding".
items.desc_zh: 新闻协会的一项调查发现，主要零售商为“通勤”和“城市骑行”的电动滑板车做广告。
